zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron於1440年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾萊特分萊時，他的父親Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron50歲，母親Isabel Drummond50歲。他於1458年與Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾凱普享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron于1440年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾萊特分萊时，他的父亲Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron50岁，母亲Isabel Drummond50岁。他于1458年与Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年在苏格兰藍納可爾凱普享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Allan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , used mainly in Scotland and North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron was born in 1440, in Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 50 and his mother, Isabel Drummond, was 50. He married Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell in 1458, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1480, in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron est né en 1440, à Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabel Drummond, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell en 1458, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1480, à Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron 1440 in Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron 50 und seine Mutter Isabel Drummond 50. Er hat 1458 in Scotland Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron è nato il nel 1440 nel Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Drummond, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell nel 1458, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1480, nel Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameronが1440年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアレッテルフィンレイで生まれた時，父Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameronは50歳，母Isabel Drummondは50歳であった。1458年にスコットランドでMarriott of Keppoch MacDonellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアケップオチで40歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron(이)가 1440년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 레터핀레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Drummond(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1458년 스컷랜드에서 Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 케프포치에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron nasceu em 1440, em Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Drummond, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell em 1458, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1480, em Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron родился в 1440 г. в местности леттирфинлеи, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Drummond, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell в 1458 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1480 г. в местности кеппоч, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron nació en 1440, en Letterfinlay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Isabel Drummond, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell en 1458, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1480, en Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Lanarkshire, Scotland.
